smoke.detail: sop kind: no code/env/smoke. README carries all gate-required sections (URL, INPUTS, OUTPUT FIELDS, LEDGER) plus SELECT and the fixed three-field output shape (fe / CLr / fu_p) with units + direction.

note: Web-only DruMAP renal SOP (organism=human); documents the one-session F-14 batch with t38 (P-gp brain) + CLint/Fa; CLr unit flagged to confirm on the live page; triage-only, renal-vs-hepatic fork resolved by experiment; ledger shape matches core.ledger with source=DruMAP + run_by.
